name: 50 MG Cilostazol Tablets IP
about: 50 MG Cilostazol Tablets IP is a solid dosage form of general medicine with each tablet containing 50 mg of the active ingredient cilostazol. This medication works by improving blood flow in the legs, reducing the symptoms of intermittent claudication (pain while walking) in patients with peripheral arterial disease. These tablets are manufactured in India and are available in a physical form of tablets. It should be stored in a dry place to maintain its efficacy.

faq.q: What is the dosage of 50 MG Cilostazol Tablets IP?
faq.a: Each tablet of 50 MG Cilostazol Tablets IP contains 50 mg of cilostazol.

faq.q: What is the drug type of 50 MG Cilostazol Tablets IP?
faq.a: 50 MG Cilostazol Tablets IP is a general medicine used to treat peripheral arterial disease.

faq.q: What is the physical form of 50 MG Cilostazol Tablets IP?
faq.a: 50 MG Cilostazol Tablets IP is a solid dosage form available in the form of tablets.

faq.q: How should 50 MG Cilostazol Tablets IP be stored?
faq.a: 50 MG Cilostazol Tablets IP should be stored in a dry place to maintain its efficacy.

faq.q: What is the origin of 50 MG Cilostazol Tablets IP?
faq.a: 50 MG Cilostazol Tablets IP is manufactured in India.
